summary: Lead forwarded the gameplay anti-grid research and visual readability feedback to the client_engineer. M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 resumes with hard constraints to replace the player-facing default grid-derived map projection with topology-backed client read models and explicit route-node polylines.

decisions.decision: Client implementation may resume, but final REVIEW must prove the default player map is topology-backed and no longer grid/hex/lattice/sequential-id/centroid-derived.

Client may only use allowed task paths. If accepted topology surfaces are insufficient, writer must report BLOCKED_FOR_ALLOWED_SCOPE_GAP instead of editing forbidden schema/sim/save/content paths or inventing renderer authority.

risks.summary: The implementation touches client projection, map renderer planning, UI copy, tests, and screenshots; systems and QA review must inspect actual diff, not only visual output.

requested_action: Implement topology-backed client map and route decision surface, then return writer REVIEW handoff with anti-grid evidence.
